title: crotalaria varians
intro: Crotalaria varians, also known as the variable rattlebox or variable crotalaria, is a plant species in the pea family that is native to tropical Africa and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria varians include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues and digestive problems. Crotalaria varians can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in Ayurvedic and traditional African medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
